owasp_top10.note: Maps to Broken Access Control when exploited to modify privilege-related or otherwise protected fields; not all mass assignment results in access control bypass
Competing interpretation: root cause is an insecure design pattern (unrestricted model binding). Preserving as alternative, not consensus.

cwe.note: Direct and specific: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes
Umbrella mapping only; prefer CWE-915 where supported
